title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft announced seven new in-house AI models including MAI-Thinking-1 (a reasoning model), Scout (an always-on agent), Codename MDASH, and Majorana 2 (a quantum effort). The announcement represents Microsoft's strategy to build a full-stack AI platform that positions it as both a partner and competitor to OpenAI.
